brand.name: Shannon Engineering
brand.tone: Ultra modern, premium corporate, authoritative, precise, luxurious

theme.description: Dark Navy and Steel Gray foundations to represent structural integrity and corporate strength. Bright white areas for clear reading (About/Services), punctuated by premium Gold and Orange accents for calls to action.

surfaces_and_shadows.card_dark: bg-[#151C2F] border border-white/5 shadow-2xl transition-all duration-300 hover:border-[#D4AF37]/40 hover:-translate-y-1
surfaces_and_shadows.card_light: bg-white border border-gray-100 shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 hover:border-[#E67E22]/40 hover:-translate-y-1

layout_spacing.grid_bento: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6 lg:gap-8

hero_stagger.item: initial: { opacity: 0, y: 30 }, animate: { opacity: 1, y: 0, transition: { duration: 0.8, ease: [0.22, 1, 0.36, 1] } }

components.header: Sticky nav (z-50) using 'glass_nav'. Logo left, Links center, CTA right. Use framer-motion to slide down on load.
components.hero: Relative h-screen. Video background absolute inset-0 z-0 object-cover. Scrim overlay 'bg-black/60' z-10. Content z-20 flex flex-col justify-center items-center text-center.
components.buttons: Primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-[#0A1128] font-bold hover:bg-[#E67E22] hover:scale-105 transition-all. Secondary: border border-white/20 hover:bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-sm text-white.
components.project_card: Relative group overflow-hidden rounded-none. Image scales up on hover (scale-110 duration-700). Bottom gradient overlay (from-black/90 to-transparent) to ensure title legibility.
components.animated_counter: Use Framer Motion useInView and useSpring to animate stats like '25+ Years', '500+ Projects'.

sections: Hero: Video background, staggered typography, scroll down indicator.
About Teaser: Asymmetrical layout. Left: Engineer image. Right: Text content + Timeline preview.
Services Overview: 3-column grid. Dark cards with gold icons.
Featured Projects: Interactive masonry or 2x2 grid. Hover states are critical.
CTA Section: Solid dark navy background with bold typography to contact.
Header: Simple text hero with subtle dark blueprint texture.
Timeline: Vertical line with intersection observer revealing milestones.
Grid Expansion: Grid of services. Each card has a subtle hover lift. Click/Hover reveals more details (accordion style or height transition).
Filterable Gallery: Buttons to filter (All, Commercial, Residential, Infrastructure). React state filters the grid.
Project Cards: High-res images, title, category tag.
Hero Image/Carousel: Swiper carousel or top hero image.
Info Strip: Grid showing Location, Year, Scope, Client.
Content: Rich description next to structural images.
Form: Modern Shadcn form, floating labels (or minimal bottom-border only), dark inputs.
Map/Info: Google Maps embed + Contact details with icon animations.

testing.data_testid_rule: Every button, link, and interactive element MUST have a descriptive data-testid attribute.

developer_notes.data: Mock all project data in a separate js file (e.g., sampleProjects.js) to keep components clean.
